description: This file defines styling variables, classes, and mixins for pagination components in a CSS preprocessor syntax, utilizing Sass features such as variables, mixins, and nested rules.

classes.name: pagination
classes.description: Defines CSS variables and layout styles for pagination containers.

classes.name: page-link
classes.description: Styles for individual pagination links, including different states like hover, focus, active, and disabled.

classes.name: page-item
classes.description: Styles for pagination item containers, handling spacing and border-radius based on position.

methods.name: pagination-size
methods.description: Mixin to configure sizing for different pagination variants (large, small).
